html:
Exclusive to:

The Wooden Walking Stick is a Character-specific Item craftable by Woodie in Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted in Woodie's Survivor Filter after unlocking Cane Carving in his Skill Tree.

It requires 3 Logs, 1 Charcoal, and Lucy the Axe to craft, with Lucy not being consumed in the process.

The Walking Stick can be equipped by any character. While equipped, it increases the character's speed by 15%, which is 10% less than a Walking Cane. Also unlike the Cane, the Stick has a durability of 4 in-game days, after which it breaks, but it only decreases while the wearer is moving. Additionally, it can be added to a Campfire or Fire Pit for fuel, even when its durability is nearly gone.

Tips

  • This item is valuable for Woodie to craft for himself and other players in the early game, as it has a very low cost and allows for a handheld walking speed bonus before you acquire Walrus Tusks.
  • The Wooden Walking Stick can fuel a Campfire for 3 minutes and a Fire Pit for 6 minutes, the same duration as the sum of its materials, regardless of durability, making nearly broken Walking Sticks a very efficient fuel source.
  • While a player can attack with the Stick equipped, it technically cannot be used as a weapon, as the character will do the slow unarmed punching animation and deal 10 damage.
    • Attacking with the Stick equipped does not drain its durability.

Trivia

  • The Wooden Walking Stick was introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie update.

“Sorry Woby, maybe we can play fetch later.”
–Walter
“Nothing like a walking stick to add some pep to one's step.”
–Wanda
The Wooden Walking Stick is a Character-specific Item craftable by Woodie in Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted in Woodie's Survivor Filter after unlocking Cane Carving in his Skill Tree.
It requires 3 Logs, 1 Charcoal, and Lucy the Axe to craft, with Lucy not being consumed in the process.
The Walking Stick can be equipped by any character. While equipped, it increases the character's speed by 15%, which is 10% less than a Walking Cane. Also unlike the Cane, the Stick has a durability of 4 in-game days, after which it breaks, but it only decreases while the wearer is moving. Additionally, it can be added to a Campfire or Fire Pit for fuel, even when its durability is nearly gone.
Tips[edit | edit source]
This item is valuable for Woodie to craft for himself and other players in the early game, as it has a very low cost and allows for a handheld walking speed bonus before you acquire Walrus Tusks.
The Wooden Walking Stick can fuel a Campfire for 3 minutes and a Fire Pit for 6 minutes, the same duration as the sum of its materials, regardless of durability, making nearly broken Walking Sticks a very efficient fuel source.
While a player can attack with the Stick equipped, it technically cannot be used as a weapon, as the character will do the slow unarmed punching animation and deal 10 damage.
Attacking with the Stick equipped does not drain its durability.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Wooden Walking Stick was introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie update.

The '''Wooden Walking Stick''' is a [[Character]]-specific [[Item]] craftable by [[Woodie/Don't Starve Together|Woodie]] in ''Don't Starve Together''. It can only be crafted in Woodie's [[Survivor_Items_Filter#Woodie|Survivor Filter]] after unlocking ''[[Woodie/Don't_Starve_Together#Carving|Cane Carving]]'' in his [[Insight|Skill Tree]].

It requires 3 [[Logs]], 1 [[Charcoal]], and [[Lucy the Axe]] to craft, with Lucy not being consumed in the process.

The Walking Stick can be equipped by any character. While equipped, it increases the character's speed by 15%, which is 10% less than a [[Walking Cane]]. Also unlike the Cane, the Stick has a durability of 4 in-game days, after which it breaks, but it only decreases while the wearer is moving. Additionally, it can be added to a [[Campfire]] or [[Fire Pit]] for [[fuel]], even when its durability is nearly gone.

== {{pic|32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* This item is valuable for Woodie to craft for himself and other players in the early game, as it has a very low cost and allows for a handheld walking speed bonus before you acquire [[Walrus Tusk]]s.
* The Wooden Walking Stick can fuel a [[Campfire]] for 3 minutes and a [[Fire Pit]] for 6 minutes, the same duration as the sum of its materials, regardless of durability, making nearly broken Walking Sticks a very efficient fuel source.
* While a player can attack with the Stick equipped, it technically cannot be used as a weapon, as the character will do the slow unarmed punching animation and deal 10 damage.
** Attacking with the Stick equipped does not drain its durability.

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Wooden Walking Stick was introduced in the ''[[Skill Spotlight Update#Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie|Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie]]'' update.
